authority_budget: no external publication, destructive git operation, or private-source disclosure authority
risk_budget: no private source text may be published
replanning_policy: emit residual and repair locally when validation fails
stop_conditions: unavailable source text for a source-derived claim
dispatch_receipts: load-source-context -> job-demo-001 with source notes and outline available
residual_register: shape-only fixture; no planner quality claim
non_claims: fixture does not prove dependency optimality
fixture does not prove execution success
